hooks.command: python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath',''))" | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.pyi?$' && echo "$f" | grep -qE '^sieval/(tasks|datasets)/' && python scripts/sync_package_stubs.py || true; }

python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath',''))" | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '^sieval/(tasks|datasets)/.*\.py$' && python scripts/sync_meta_index.py || true; }

python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath',''))" | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.pyi?$' && ruff check "$f" || true; }

python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath',''))" | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.pyi?$' && ty check "$f" || true; }
